{{Quote|Do her best, she will. A great amount, that is.|[[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]], on Winna Di Yuni's attempts to heal Didi Oddo|<ref name="TEE" />}}
'''Winna Di Yuni''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the final [[Standard year/Legends|decades]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|female]], Winna Di Yuni was [[Jedi training/Legends|educated]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], eventually attaining the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. Training independently as a [[Jedi Consular|Consular]], Master Yuni perfected her [[Force healing/Legends|Force healing]] abilities and went on to become one of the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple's]] finest [[Jedi healer/Legends|diagnosticians]].<ref name="TEE" />

In [[43 BBY/Legends|43 BBY]], Master Di Yuni was stationed in the Temple's [[Halls of Healing]] when Master [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] brought his friend, [[Didi Oddo]], for treatment after the man had been poisoned by a chemical agent of unknown source. Upon discovering the agent was created by the deranged [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] [[Jenna Zan Arbor]], Master Di Yuni was able to apply the proper cure for Oddo's ailment and he made a full recovery.<ref name="TDR">''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Dangerous Rescue]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
